name: @sancho/cli
description: npx launcher for the Python-native Sancho Fetch CLI

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let s=fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'); if (s.charCodeAt(0)===0xFEFF) s=s.slice(1); const p=JSON.parse(s); if (p.bin.sancho !== 'bin/sancho.js' || p.bin['sancho-mcp-quick'] !== 'bin/sancho-mcp-quick.js') process.exit(1);"
